title: calycosia callithrix
intro: Calycosia callithrix, also known as the "pia" plant, is a type of tropical plant native to Hawaii, belonging to the family Blechnaceae. The leaves and stems of Calycosia callithrix have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, treating wounds and skin conditions, and aiding in digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
